content: Never use em dashes. Use commas instead. No exceptions.
All content must be scannable: headings, short paragraphs (2-4 sentences), bulleted lists, tables. No text blobs. A GM must find what they need in 5 minutes.
No purple prose: avoid shimmering, ethereal, eldritch, ineffable, resplendent. Be evocative but grounded in sensory detail.
